{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065258AB01E8BE906E4B5A56C4"}"},"total":37},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616776985256755993","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我的天，简直超级无敌霹雳爆炸美味啊😭
虽然刚开始的文笔有些青涩，有些地方衔接略显僵硬，但是关键剧情的节奏把握我超喜欢[顶帖]！！！（我看书速度挺快的，特别是前面铺垫部分，可以说就算有瑕疵我大多都可以忽略，我会更看重关键剧情点的节奏把握发展啥的）
个人觉得瑕不掩瑜，喜欢喜欢喜欢喜欢！！！推荐推荐推荐！！！
刀子方便觉得还好，刀的我很爽，后面看的我真是边哭边笑（个人习惯偶尔会交错岔开看的）非常爽啊，感情拉扯啥的，虽然大多是对面单方面纠结拉扯，但是！！！吃的就是这款！这种微微有些木头的主角！所有人都单方面喜欢主角啥的最香了[飞吻]！！
对面攻视角让我想到之前看魔道里的话[捂脸]“你若没有那心思，就不要随意撩拨人家，自己随心所欲，却害别人心烦意乱” 特别是贝利亚那边哈哈哈哈哈哈
爽！all向吃的就是这种拉扯！！所有人都为我们主角痴迷！
主角比较典型的美强惨啊，性格属于大众接受度很高的那种（我个人很喜欢😁）我刚开始还怕最后性格会变成纯黑型，因为我很吃角色内心的那块柔软角落，不管是什么性格的主角只要有内心的那一块柔软真的很吸引人（当然❗❗❗不支持因为这点狠虐主角哈😭，小虐怡情，大虐伤身❗❗❗）
最后！真的很好看！老师我会追随你…求更[顶帖]","text_exts":[{"e":332,"s":329,"text":"贝利亚","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B4%9D%E5%88%A9%E4%BA%9A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741335784B5A56C4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616776985256755993%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227609311880267435032%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B4%9D%E5%88%A9%E4%BA%9A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":380,"s":377,"text":"美强惨","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741335784B5A56C4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616776985256755993%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227609311880267435032%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773422763,"group_id":"7609311880267435032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N04KrylLJCA1om45gsS+lphmsqvoPjPsB/dudsKGNRXL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ff48cabdff4475382c41093ae4098de~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702865&x-signature=irrTO1k%2Btv5H32SjjX2%2B2%2BwtMQ0%3D","user_id":"1347345229028355","user_name":"礼i1"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1347345229028355","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609311880267435032","book_info":{"abstract":"【本体奥+后期马甲+戏精+自磕+无女主+美强惨+中心向+全员单箭头+修罗场+火葬场+系统+死遁】【主角亦正亦邪，慎入】
命运温柔地将他推向光之国最中央。
穿越奥特曼，还自带系统？
什么，奥特兄弟都是我哥?
可系统一出手，就把他伪装成：
人前：正义凛然小奥特。
人后：迷失黑暗弥赛斯。
表面是哥哥们眼中无辜可怜的弟弟，实际确实宇宙恶霸，有宇宙人传话：“那弥赛斯辗转风尘，投身各大势力的怀抱，简直不要太那个了！
什么！原来是直的?
什么！原来在欺骗感情?
天理难容！”
（有私设，文笔小白，任何读者的留言都是我的精神食粮）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6891d98ea9f1c9b4abec8dbd9363cac7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"盈手","author_id":"","book_id":"7609311880267435032","book_name":"奥特日常：他们好像总盯着我不放","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":863,"name":"戏精","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=863&name=戏精&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609319696734618136","read_count":"19678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"159931"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"67","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,无CP,同人,戏精,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6891d98ea9f1c9b4abec8dbd9363cac7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317578&x-signature=2C4TbgWoEyrVOkUtynwYtTd4zzI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"244514507982224","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065258AB01E8BE906E4B5A56C4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"fo
